purpose: Gate 6 public Bluesky fixture manifest for cached eval provenance.
verification_method: Read-only public AppView calls: com.atproto.identity.resolveHandle and app.bsky.feed.getPostThread.
default_eval_network_policy: make eval does not read this manifest live and performs no network calls.
limitations: The manifest proves the URLs were publicly resolvable when curated, not that default cached eval refetched them.
Synthetic attack fixtures remain necessary for prompt-injection, private URL, unavailable/deleted, contradictory-source, and non-English edge coverage.
Live provider-backed quality remains explicit API-mode work and is not hidden inside make eval.
